response.justification: The candidate meets the 15-year minimum engineering experience requirement and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial and open-source leadership credentials. However, the core requirement—'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'—is not met. AI experience is limited to very recent MCP tooling work (current role, ~2 months) with no demonstrated strategic AI product development. Missing the preferred Master's/PhD in AI and lacks clear director-level strategic leadership evidence.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) meeting the minimum requirement
Proven entrepreneurial track record as GISCollective founder and contributor to multiple startups (WatchUp, Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
Strong open-source and community leadership through libraries, conference talks, and educational workshops
concerns: AI expertise is extremely recent and limited to MCP code generators; no demonstrated AI products or platforms as explicitly required
Missing preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field; only holds BS in Computer Science
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, C-suite advising, or transformational initiatives
